upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra parvatA anavanta pra gAvaH' (f॰8.85.5) prARavanta=anadan aSabdAyanta gAvo'reBanta (aramBanta) parvatAScAgarjan ityarTaH
'omiti praROti' (E॰brA॰5.32) praROti=uccArayati viSizwe'rTe DAtoH pAWaH sAmAnye prayogaH
'zoqaSaBiH praROti' (E॰brA॰4.16.33) zaRRAmakzarARAmante om ityakzaramuccArayatItyarTaH
'ya etadevaM vidvAnakzaraM praROti' (CAM॰u॰1.4.5) ukto'rTaH
'savyena kuSAnAdAya dakziRenApanOti' (SAM॰gf॰1.8) apanOti=ekataH karoti
'samaNgiraso navanta goBiH' (f॰4.3.11) vASyamAnABirgoBiH samamAkroSan ityAha
'some arkAstrizwuBaH sannavante' (f॰9.97.35) sannavante=saNgacCante
'asaScataH SataDArA aBiSriyo hariM navante'va tA udanyuvaH' (f0 98627) avanavante=gacCanti=saNgacCanti ayamupasargakfto DAtvarTabADaH
'purutrA te vi pUrtayo navanta kzoRayo yaTA' (f0 10229) vinavanta=Avartante
Anute SfgAlaH ANi nupracCyoriti vArtike vfttAvudAharaRam Anute kroSati rOti vASyate ANA SabdaviSezAtstutilakzaRAdapakfzya SabdasAmAnye DAturvyavasTApitaH
'(patattriRaH) mandramAnuvAnAH' (Bawwi0 867) ukto'rTaH
'A vAmftAya keSinIranUzata' (f0 11566)
'A kalaSA anUzatendo DArABirojasA' (f0 96514) AnUzata Dvananti
'agnizWAM tasyASrimAhavanIyAditTaM vetTaM vAti nAvayet' (tE0 saM0 6344) AvartayedityarTaH
'aBI navante'druhaH priyamindrasya kAmyam' (f0 91100)
'aBi tvA SUra nonumaH' (f0 73222) BfSaM punaH punarvA stuma ityarTaH
'imA u tvA Satakrato'Bi pra RonuvurgiraH indra vatsaM na mAtaraH' (f0 64525) aBipraRonuvuH Sabdayanti aBivASyante AkArayanti
'tvABi pra Ronumo jetAramaparAjitam' (f0 1112) punaH punarBfSaM vA stuma ityarTaH
'imA aBi pra Ronumo vipAmagrezu DItayaH' (f0 867) punaH punargfRIma ityarTaH
'tvAM viSve amfta jAyamAnaM SiSuM na devA aBi saM navante' (f0 674) aBisaMnavante samamaBinandanti
'yatrABi saMnavAmahe' (aTarva0 20922)
'pfTayetTaM kalapadEH pariRutAKilodayaH mandaM jahAsa vEkuRWaH…' (BA0 pu0 1844) pariRuto'BizwutaH
